title: Noah Lucas homepage v037 interaction and product-leadership cleanup
changeSummary: Makes expanded Impact copy readable with an opaque theme-aware media panel.
Hardens the Sift segment carousel with preload, canplay, ended, and boundary-seek handling, plus poster fallback for every segment.
Moves the Anduril flying ghost-drone video to the first carousel position.
Removes the standalone role-fingerprint chart gallery from the outward-facing page.
Rebuilds the T-shaped executive section as a clear breadth-across-the-company and depth-in-frontier-systems profile.
Fixes hero alignment and long domain-copy wrapping at the top of the page.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local source validation plus public staging browser check after GitHub Pages deployment.
